question: Identify the Wyoming county that had at least 150 and fewer than 180 VA disability compensation recipients in FY 2019 and at least 260 and fewer than 280 VA disability compensation recipients in FY 2023. Which one-room schoolhouse located in that county was built in 1903 and used as a school until the 1950s? Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/fy-2019-disability-pension-recipient-by-county/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), sep=",", engine="c", low_memory=False)

filtered = df[df["State"].astype(str).str.strip().str.lower().eq('Wyoming'.lower())].copy()
filtered['# Total: Disability Compensation Recipients'] = pd.to_numeric(filtered['# Total: Disability Compensation Recipients'], errors="coerce")
filtered = filtered[(filtered['# Total: Disability Compensation Recipients'] >= 150) & (filtered['# Total: Disability Compensation Recipients'] < 180)]
county_names = filtered['County name'].dropna().astype(str).str.strip()
county_names = county_names.apply(lambda x: x if x.lower().endswith("county") else x + " County")
answer = sorted(county_names.unique().tolist())
1.subquestion: Which Wyoming counties had at least 150 and fewer than 180 VA disability compensation recipients in FY 2019?

2.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/fy-2023-disability-compensation-recipients-by-county/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), sep=",", engine="c", low_memory=False)

filtered = df[df["State"].astype(str).str.strip().str.lower().eq('Wyoming'.lower())].copy()
filtered['Total: Disability Compensation Recipients'] = pd.to_numeric(filtered['Total: Disability Compensation Recipients'], errors="coerce")
filtered = filtered[(filtered['Total: Disability Compensation Recipients'] >= 260) & (filtered['Total: Disability Compensation Recipients'] < 280)]
county_names = filtered['County Name'].dropna().astype(str).str.strip()
county_names = county_names.apply(lambda x: x if x.lower().endswith("county") else x + " County")
answer = sorted(county_names.unique().tolist())
2.subquestion: Which Wyoming counties had at least 260 and fewer than 280 VA disability compensation recipients in FY 2023?

3.fact: The Lower Shell School House is located in an isolated portion of Big Horn County, Wyoming on a bluff near Shell Creek. The one-room schoolhouse was built in 1903, and was one of the first buildings in the area that did not use log construction. The school functioned as a church and Sunday school, and as a community meeting place. It was used as a school until the 1950s, and as a community meeting house until the 1970s.
